results.input_data: Navigate to the Salesforce and Create 2 Contact records in Salesforce having below field values filled: First Name, Last Name, Account Name (select any available existing Account record), Email, Title, Department, and All the Phone fields. Do not fill any Address fields. Once saved, return the Salesforce RecordIDs as Output.
results.expected_output: Record or operation completed successfully in Salesforce with valid data returned
